meaning: n.变形,变貌,[宗](耶稣在三个门徒前的)变容
examples: Lift us up to the Mount of Transfiguration!
The Transfiguration is not just about a glorious experience.
The Transfiguration is a real foretaste of heavenly realities.
Raphael died his sudden Easter death in a house in this square, whilst painting Margherita's face into his Transfiguration.
There really is no economics of transfiguration, or conversion and deconversion in a spiritual or poetic sense, or surprise, or tragedy, or redemption.
